/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -Wall -Wextra -O2 CMakeFiles/httpserver.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver.dir/src/server/http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver.dir/src/server/request_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver.dir/src/server/response_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver.dir/src/server/file_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver.dir/src/server/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver.dir/src/utils/socket_utils.cpp.o -o httpserver
